prefill.goal: I want a site audit for [site or project URL]. The main outcome I want is [outcome]. The biggest issue I need help diagnosing is [issue].

hero.title: Start the audit request.
hero.subheadline: Send the site, the problem, and the outcome you want. If the fit is real, I will tell you quickly.
hero.intro: This route is for the scoped site audit. Clear context makes it easy to judge fit, urgency, and whether your site is the right kind of problem for this offer.

form.transition: Send the site, the main problem, and what you want fixed first.
form.intro: A few specifics is enough. I do not need a polished brief. I need the real situation.
form.submit_note: If the fit is real, I will reply with next steps and current availability.
form.success_message: Audit request received. If the fit is real, you will hear back at the email you provided.

prefill.goal: I want to hear when the guild opens. The skills or projects I care most about are [skills, niches, or kinds of builds].

hero.title: Join the early-interest list.
hero.subheadline: If the guild or monthly membership sounds relevant, send a short note here.
hero.intro: This is not a hard sell funnel. It is just a clean way to raise your hand so I know what people actually want when the next offer opens.

form.transition: Tell me what kind of build, skills, or support you would want from the guild.
form.intro: A short note is enough. Specific beats polished.
form.submit_note: This just records interest and context. I will reach out when there is something real to show.
form.success_message: Waitlist request received. I will reach out when there is something real to show.

inquiry_types.label: Learning about digital systems or AI visibility
Building a website, content system, or digital property

stages.label: Stuck and need a second opinion
There is a live issue that needs attention

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.help: Use the address where a real reply should go.

fields.name: website
fields.label: Website or project URL
fields.help: If there is something live, send it. If not, leave this blank.

fields.name: inquiry_type
fields.label: What best describes your inquiry?
fields.help: This helps route the conversation fast.

fields.name: goal
fields.label: What are you actually trying to accomplish?
fields.placeholder: Be specific. What are you building, where are you stuck, and what would a good outcome look like?
fields.help: A few concrete details beats a long intro every time.

fields.name: stage
fields.label: Where are you in the process?
fields.help: Optional, but it helps gauge urgency and fit.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Anything else worth knowing?
fields.placeholder: Timeline, context, links, or anything that makes this easier to evaluate.
fields.help: Optional. Use this for extra context, not filler.
